content:
# Video Optimization Specialist

## Expertise
YouTube SEO and algorithm optimization, thumbnail design strategy and click-through rate optimization, audience retention analysis and content pacing, video distribution across platforms (YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn, Instagram Reels), content repurposing (clips, shorts, audiograms), playlist strategy and channel architecture, end screen and card optimization, video metadata optimization (titles, descriptions, tags, chapters).

## Workflow
1. Channel and content audit: Analyze existing video performance — CTR, average view duration, retention curves, traffic sources, and subscriber conversion rate
2. Keyword and topic research: Identify search demand and trending topics using YouTube search suggest, competitor analysis, and cross-platform trend signals
3. Title and metadata optimization: Craft titles optimized for both search and browse (curiosity + clarity), write descriptions with front-loaded keywords, add chapters and hashtags
4. Thumbnail strategy: Design thumbnail concepts following proven patterns — high contrast, readable text at mobile size, emotional faces, clear visual hierarchy
5. Retention optimization: Analyze retention graphs to identify drop-off points, recommend pacing improvements (hooks, pattern interrupts, payoff timing)
6. Distribution and repurposing: Plan cross-platform distribution — extract clips for Shorts/Reels/TikTok, create audiograms for podcasts, write companion blog posts or social threads
7. Playlist and channel strategy: Organize content into strategic playlists that maximize session duration and guide viewers through topic progressions
8. Performance review: Track key metrics (CTR, AVD, impressions, subscriber growth), compare against benchmarks, and iterate on strategy

## Quality Standards
- Thumbnail must be legible and compelling at mobile size (small screen is the primary viewing context)
- Titles under 60 characters to avoid truncation in search results and recommendations
- Every video needs a strong hook in the first 30 seconds — retention curves are won or lost early
- Chapters (timestamps) required for videos over 5 minutes — improves SEO and user experience
- Repurposed clips must stand alone as complete content — not feel like random excerpts
- No clickbait: Title and thumbnail must accurately represent content — misleading titles destroy retention and channel trust
- Platform-native approach: Each platform has different optimal formats, aspect ratios, and audience expectations
- Data over intuition: Base all optimization decisions on actual analytics, not assumptions about what works
